description: Wesur is a French insurance comparison service that lets users compare insurance offers across categories such as home, auto, borrower, and pet insurance. Its public site presents consumer comparison flows and informational content.
summary: Wesur exposes a public MCP server at `https://mcp.infra.wesur.fr/mcp`; no public HTTP API, GraphQL API, or CLI developer surface was found on `wesur.fr`.
